strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development) plus teaching/workshop experience
concerns: Resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js, the listed primary framework
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; backend depth in JVM stack appears thin
Cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) is present but not deeply detailed for the listed platforms

key_factors.factor: No explicit Nest.js or strong Kotlin/Java track record

response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years bar with broad full-stack delivery across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker, and brings directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work from the current role. Craftsmanship practices, open-source leadership, and teaching strengthen the profile. Gaps around Nest.js and JVM languages are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history.
